meaning: n.秘书处,书记处,秘书(书记,部长等)的职位
examples: The Secretariat will undertake three actions.
The Secretariat will undertake two actions, set out below.
What do you expect of future cooperation with the Secretariat?
From here, head one block northwest to the Secretaria de Educacion Publica (Education Secretariat).
He received orders from the Vatican Secretariat of State and briefed the press accordingly.
